feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Place of Supply should be a Mandatory field in "Create supplier invoice" fiori app for India GST
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are implementing S4HANA public cloud for Indian client  and we have a requirement to put a validation on the place of supply field in "Create supplier invoice" fiori app to make this field mandatory. 

Do we have a BADI in S4HANA public cloud to make this field mandatory ?

Thanks

Varun Arora

entry.title: About using custom fonts in custom form templates
entry.content:
「PDF を埋め込む」プロパティを使用して、カスタム テンプレートにカスタム フォントを設定する方法を知りたいです。
カスタム フォントは既に Adob​​e Document Services (ADS) にアップロード済みです。Windows マシンにもインストールされています。
カスタム フォントに制限はありますか?

指定したレポートにカスタム フォーム テンプレートを設定する方法も知りたいです。

よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: Custom field type Quantity with Unit
entry.content:
Hello,

we need to create a custom field in sales document header and fill it with total weight of the sales order to display this field in app Manage sales orders.

A few monthes ago we already created a similar custom field at sales document item level and filled it with gross weight of the item. This custom field was created with type Quantity with Unit.

We would like to use the same type for the custom field at header level in order to remain consistent. However, we don't know which would be the length of a custom field created with this type and were not able to find this information in SAP support or documentation. So, we are wondering if there is any risk that the total weight of an order will exceed the length of the field?

Thanks for your answers.

Aurélie

entry.title: If import parameter was not available in BADI, how can I get the parameter in s/4 hana public cloud?
entry.content:
The business requirement is to get the last purchase price and date in a "supplier quotation" or "Request for quotation" applications for a material. 

For this we have written the query using CDS views are I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 and I_PurchaseOrderAPI01.

We found the BADI for RFQ is "MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_ITEM" 

we don't have material as import parameter in the above BADI.

 

Please suggest for the solution..

Thanks in advance..

entry.title: Business Catalog for SSCUI Activity
entry.content:
Hello,

I just would like to know which business catalog is necessary for Define Plant App in Business Process Configuration in SAP CBC. Where can I look up the required business catalog for missing authorization?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Business Object - Assign UI App to Developed Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi,

We have developed several CBO's and then we have created Business Catalogs using developer extensibility.

Is it possible to add these CBOs to the developed Business Catalogs?

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any difference in the APIs between S/4HANA Cloud and S/4HANA onPremise?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using API to integrate with S/4HANA Cloud. We also want to use the same code to support S/4HANA onPremise. So here we want to confirm with you, is there any difference in the APIs between Cloud and On-Prem?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom CDS view authorizations
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

How can we set authorization to custom CDS views created via app  “Custom CDS Views” in SAP public cloud edition?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Seeking Guidance on Mapping Screens to Fields in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am new to the SAP S/4 HANA world and trying to transition into the technical field. My background is in SAP B1, where SAP provides excellent documentation that helps map screens to tables and fields.

In SAP S/4 HANA, I am finding it challenging to understand the mapping process. For example, if I have a specific screen, how can I identify the fields that might be mapped to either custom CDS views or public endpoints?

I am feeling a bit lost and would greatly appreciate your support and guidance on this matter.

entry.title: Purchase Requisition Email Notification template setting
entry.content:
Is that possible to send email notification after Purchase Requisition creation?

Is there any documentation that describe specific steps to use standard email template?

 

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Execute Business Object Interface from action
entry.content:
Hi community,

A common request from customers is that a report execute a certain process and if one of the process "fail" not continue with the others process. In S/4HANA Public Cloud, the replacement for BAPI's are the Local APIs (Business Object Interfaces - BOI) for example I_MaterialDocumentTP. Only for reference, this example is obtained from the standard Knowledge Transfer Document. In theory, the REPORTED structure must return messages in case of an error occurs, but that is not the case.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_materialdocumenttp
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid                          = 'CID_001'
                                    goodsmovementcode             = '01'
                                    postingdate                   = '31129999'
                                    documentdate                  = '31129999'
                                    %control-goodsmovementcode                    = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-postingdate                          = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-documentdate                         = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                ) )
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem
             FROM VALUE #( (
                             %cid_ref = 'CID_001'
                             %target = VALUE #( ( %cid                           = 'CID_ITM_001'
                                                  plant                          = '1010'
                                                  material                       = 'RAW_MATERIAL_01'
                                                  GoodsMovementType              = '501'
                                                  storagelocation                = '101A'
                                                  QuantityInEntryUnit            = 1
                                                  entryunit                      = 'ST'
                                                  %control-plant                 = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-material              = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-GoodsMovementType     = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-storagelocation       = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-QuantityInEntryUnit   = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-entryunit             = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                              ) )

                                               
                         ) )
             MAPPED   DATA(ls_create_mapped)
             FAILED   DATA(ls_create_failed)
             REPORTED DATA(ls_create_reported).

 The "errors" only are obtained when the COMMIT ENTITIES in the REPORTED structure.

COMMIT ENTITIES
  RESPONSE OF i_materialdocumenttp
  FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

 Of course, in the context of ABAP RAP, the use of COMMIT is not supported.

If I'm developing an application with ABAP RAP and I have an action that need to create a material document and report if an error occurs, who could I achieve that?

I know the existence of different methods of "asynchronous code execution" (app. jobs, bgPF and events), if this is the only way... what could be the best option to report/show to the user that material document is processing in background and when the process ends show the errors or the new document created?

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: Assistance Required: Retrieving Business Partner Full Name in S/4 Hana Public Edition via SO API
entry.content:
Dear All

I'm currently retrieving Sales Order details from the S/4 Hana Public Edition System. While utilizing the $expand parameter, I'm able to access linked Business Partner Details. However, I'm encountering an issue where the Business Partner Full Name field isn't present in the response. Could anyone guide me on how to include this field?

SAP S/4 HANA Business Partner Details - C00002 & the Business Partner Full Name is URBAN OUTFITTERS WHOLESALE INC.

Sales Order API Response with using $Expand To_Partner - https://xxx.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder('B2C0700004')?$expand=to_Partner

Business Partner API Response as an Example

Please help.

entry.title: Why is a Code List based on Custom CDS View not working in Display/Change Maintenance Order Page?
entry.content:
I have created and added a Custom Field that is of type Code List based on CDS View.

The Primary Data source for this Custom CDS View is based off a Custom Business Object.

The Scenario of this Custom CDS View is "Value Help". 

I have successfully published all the above components, however upon adding the Custom Field in the Maintenance Order Page (Display/ Change) thru Adapt UI, it remains to display as a Text Field instead of an option to open the Code List.

entry.title: API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT throwing 'Provide Line-IDs' error during a POST call with Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

I have created a custom field with Business Context as 'Material Document Item' in Custom Fields App in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud . I have enabled it for ODATA Service API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV and at GUI level it is disabled.

When i do a GET call at Header Level (Extending to Line Item) using API Material Documents - Read, Create ; it successfully gives me the Material Document details with header and line items(along with the created custom fields). But when i do a POST call for posting a material document by putting custom fields in to the Payload, i get an error message saying 'Provide line ID's when using Business Context MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM'.

POST call works fine if i remove the custom field.

Attached screenshots of Successful GET Call with Custom fields, payload Used for POST call and Error message during POST call.

Please suggest me a solution to resolve above mentioned issue.

entry.title: key field is not enough in custom CDS view
entry.content:
What will happen if key field is not enough in custom CDS view, in other words,  if we just use key fields are taken from primary data source, don't add additional key fields, and  there are multiple rows that have the same key in preview of a custom CDS view, including CDS view, external API,etc.

We must define multiple keys in a custom CDS view to ensure unique identification  to every record?

entry.title: Create data using Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)
entry.content:
Hello, 

I want to create data to S4 hana system using "Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) as in the the link . 

But I cannot create and there is error of "Balance in transaction currency Balance in transaction currency JPY 220,000 is too large for automatic correction is too large for automatic correction". I have also tested by changing the tolerance amount in configuration setting. But still getting the same error.

While creating from "Post Incoming Payment" app, there is the field "Amount" to make the total balance zero. 

But in api, I didn't see any field to add the amount value to make the total balance zero. 

Could you please guide me how to create the data using that api? 

Could you please provide me the correct soap code with sample? 

Best Regards,

Pyae

 

#S4Hana #JE Clearing #Post incoming payments

entry.title: Use of table is not permitted error while implementing custom logic using key user extensibility
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a custom table  ZEDI_UPLD in ADT. Data is present in that table. Also created a custom field at billing header level using custom fields app in S4 hana public cloud system. 

I want to print this custom filed with its value for the tax invoice. For this i want to pass the value to that custom field from the data available in custom table which i have created in ADT while printing the invoice.

For this I am trying to implement the custom logic using BADI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER.

Below is my code.

 

 

 

 

 

Here I am getting error that 'Use of the table is not permitted' for  table ZEDI_UPLD

How to resolve it.

Can anybody help me here.?

entry.title: API for creating Communication Management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there an opportunity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create a Communication User, Communication System, or Communication Arrangement using APIs or classes?
I only found APIs for reading on https://api.sap.com/, but I need creation.

BR,
Oleg Vokh

entry.title: Hello,I want to show the "Text" field in Goods Movement Analysis from Post Goods Movement.
entry.content:
Althouht the value of this field carry from logic, don`t show in the Goods Movement Analysis report.

Could you please guide me how to show custom field value in the report?
